scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && conda run -n MPI-Applications python app.py
scripts.install:server: cd server && conda run -n MPI-Applications pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm run install:web && npm run install:server
scripts.clean: cd web && npx rimraf dist node_modules/.vite
scripts.clean:all: cd web && npx rimraf dist node_modules
